commit.message: Update list of archived and obsolete sources

Fix wrong date in "-f" for obsolete apps / silence xargs (#2145)

* Remove trailing/double spaces from version number

* Option -f, detect only last year reference in version (for obsolete apps)

* Ignore xargs error messages during checksum

The error come out when a URL is not in the version file but in the AM-updater. In this case we use "eval" to run the "curl" command used to determine a URL to use in "wget".

Not a critical error btw.

See https://github.com/ivan-hc/AM/issues/2141#issuecomment-4048295814 for reference

* Update check-obsolete-sources.sh - sort and detect maximum year
